# Babula Shots Inmobiliaria — Real Estate Photography Dominican Republic

> Real estate photography, video, drone, and social content for agents, developers, Airbnb hosts, villas, hotels, and commercial properties in the Dominican Republic. Part of the Babula Shots RD network.

Owner: Michal Nikodem Babula
Contact: info@babulashotsrd.com · WhatsApp +1 809 720 9547
Rating: 4.9/5 from 98 Google reviews (brand-wide)
Service area: Dominican Republic only
Languages: Spanish and English
Hours: Mon–Sun, 9:00–18:00 Atlantic Standard Time (UTC-4)

## Main pages

- [Real estate photography — Dominican Republic (homepage)](https://inmobiliaria.babulashotsrd.com)
